summary: Made two surgical seam edits: anchored the opening against the Chapter 12 clinic timeline and softened the closing beat so the apartment remains active heading into Chapter 14.
edits: Rewrote the opening sentence to tie Tiana's office visit to Marcia and Micah still being at the clinic across town.
Adjusted the final line so the chapter exits with the household still in motion rather than in a fully closed resting beat.
